name: Hilton Honors American Express Surpass Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 130,000 Hilton Honors Bonus Points plus a Free Night Reward after spending $3,000 on eligible purchases within the first 6 months of card membership. Offer ends 4/15/26.

earning_rates.notes: Hilton Honors Bonus Points per dollar at hotels and resorts within the Hilton portfolio

hotel_status.method: Automatic for as long as the card is open
Earned by spending $40,000 on eligible purchases in a calendar year (valid through end of next calendar year)

other_benefits.name: National Emerald Club Executive Status
other_benefits.description: Car rental status with National Car Rental (enrollment required)

other_benefits.name: Fifth Night Free
other_benefits.description: Fifth night free on reward stays (all Honors members)

sources.notes: 130K points + Free Night after $3K spend in 6 months, ends 4/15/26; earning rates 12x/6x/4x/3x
Confirmed 130K + 1FN offer per US Credit Card Guide 2026.2 update, offer ends 4/15/26
Hilton Surpass benefits: $200 Hilton credits ($50/quarter), $150 AF, Gold→Diamond path at $40K, National status
